hero.title: AI for Myotherapist
hero.description: Your Virtual Assistant for Stress-Free Therapy Management.

stats.label: Reduction in admin time for therapy professionals.
Increase in client retention with timely reminders and follow-ups.

blocks.heading: Revolutionize How Your Myotherapy Practice Operates
blocks.description: At VirtualAssistant.com.au, our AI Virtual Receptionist is purpose-built for myotherapists and hands-on therapy professionals. It answers calls immediately, handles scheduling, provides detailed information about your services, and ensures every client interaction feels professional and personal.

blocks.heading: Focus on Treatments, Not Admin Tasks
blocks.description: Our AI Receptionist takes the pressure off your front desk by managing routine admin tasks. It can handle appointment bookings, reschedules, cancellations, reminders, and common client queries in natural conversation — giving you more time to focus on client care.

blocks.heading: Never Miss a Call or Booking Again
blocks.description: Whether you're in session with a client or your reception is unattended, our AI Receptionist steps in to handle calls and inquiries instantly. It answers questions about treatment types, duration, and availability, then confirms bookings directly in your calendar. Your clients are always looked after — even when you're hands-on.

keyBenefits.title: Key Benefits
keyBenefits.subtitle: Streamline your practice with intelligent automation that enhances patient care and reduces administrative burden.

cards.title: Automated Scheduling
cards.description: Session scheduling, reminders, and follow-ups handled automatically, reducing no-shows and improving patient adherence.

cards.title: Organized Records
cards.description: Secure storage of muscle therapy notes and progress records, accessible anytime for better continuity of care.

cards.title: Personalized Care
cards.description: Custom treatment plans and exercise logs tailored to each patient's specific muscle therapy needs.

cards.title: Better Outcomes
cards.description: Improved treatment results through timely follow-ups and consistent patient engagement.

cards.title: Reduced Stress
cards.description: Less administrative burden means more time dedicated to hands-on therapy and patient care.

cards.title: Professional Client Experience
cards.description: Every caller is greeted warmly, with fast, knowledgeable responses — no waiting or voicemail frustration.

cards.title: Custom to Your Brand
cards.description: The assistant can be trained with your clinic's tone, terminology, and pricing to sound just like your own receptionist.

cards.title: Affordable and Reliable
cards.description: Save money on staff and enjoy consistent support from an assistant that operates 24/7 without breaks.

cards.title: Grow Your Reputation
cards.description: Deliver exceptional service every time, improve online reviews, and grow your clinic's visibility on Google.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Myotherapists Choose VirtualAssistant.com.au
whyChooseUs.description: Our AI Virtual Receptionist is crafted for the unique workflow of Australian myotherapists. It integrates seamlessly with your existing booking and calendar systems, manages calls and appointments efficiently, and ensures your clinic maintains a professional image at all times. Let our AI manage the admin — so you can focus on delivering exceptional hands-on care.

card.heading: Streamlined Follow-Up and Client Management
card.description: After each treatment, myotherapists can easily add notes, record voice memos that are transcribed and summarized, and upload documents or photos linked to the client's record. All data is securely organized in your dashboard for easy access, ensuring smooth follow-ups, continuity of care, and a clear client history.

items.description: Sync with calendars to avoid overlapping bookings and conflicts.
